name: generate_qor_suggestions
full_help:
generate_qor_suggestions

Description: 
Generate QoR Suggestions

Syntax: 
generate_qor_suggestions  [-max_paths <arg>] [-evaluate_pipelining]
                          [-cell <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-max_paths]            Number of paths to consider for suggestion analysis
                          Default: 100
  [-evaluate_pipelining]  Generate DSP/BRAM pipelining xdc file
  [-cell]                 Report QOR suggestions for a given cell
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Feasibility, Report, Timing

arguments.description: Number of paths to consider for suggestion analysis Default: 100
